constraints: Operator approval ref must be review-only evidence.
The approval ref may not accept evidence, grant authority, or enable runtime.

Runtime enablement, dispatch, worker invocation, receipt emission, receipt append, terminal closure, connector authority, filesystem writes, network access, secret serialization, and success claims remain denied.
Submitted evidence refs and review packet must count twelve repo-local refs and zero missing inputs.
Evidence acceptance and runtime admission remain separate future gates.
non_goals: Do not grant runtime enablement authority.
Do not dispatch or invoke a worker.
Do not emit or append runtime receipts.
Do not serialize raw operator secret values.
problem_statement: Runtime enablement review needed the operator approval input represented as a repo-local review ref without converting that ref into acceptance or runtime authority.
success_criteria: Operator approval ref validates as review-only evidence.
Submitted evidence refs and review packet include twelve repo-local evidence refs.
Missing input count is zero while accepted evidence count remains zero.
Focused validators, focused pytest, protocol manifest validation, SDLC artifact validation, schema validation, and whitespace checks pass.
